OPENCTI_TOKEN.description: The API token for authentication to the OpenCTI platform.

CONNECTOR_NAME.description: The name of the connector as it will appear in OpenCTI.

CONNECTOR_SCOPE.description: List of scopes for the connector. Allowed values are 'IPv4-Addr', 'Domain-Name', 'StixFile'.

CONNECTOR_LOG_LEVEL.description: The minimum level of logs to display.

CONNECTOR_AUTO.description: Enables or disables automatic enrichment of observables for OpenCTI.

PROOFPOINT_ET_INTELLIGENCE_API_BASE_URL.description: The base URL used to connect to the ProofPoint ET Intelligence API endpoint.

PROOFPOINT_ET_INTELLIGENCE_API_KEY.description: The API key used for authentication to access the ProofPoint ET Intelligence API.

PROOFPOINT_ET_INTELLIGENCE_MAX_TLP.description: The maximum TLP (Traffic Light Protocol) level the connector is authorized to enrich.

PROOFPOINT_ET_INTELLIGENCE_IMPORT_LAST_S.description: The time window for importing 'last_seen' data, specified in ISO 8601 duration format.
